description: Complete multi-dialect DAX-to-SQL translation for unified financial services super-bundle

metrics.sql_server: SELECT CASE WHEN SUM(total_portfolio_value) <> 0 THEN SUM(asset_class_value) / SUM(total_portfolio_value) ELSE NULL END AS portfolio_allocation_pct FROM wealth_management
metrics.oracle: SELECT CASE WHEN SUM(total_portfolio_value) <> 0 THEN SUM(asset_class_value) / SUM(total_portfolio_value) ELSE NULL END AS portfolio_allocation_pct FROM wealth_management
metrics.postgres: SELECT CASE WHEN SUM(total_portfolio_value) <> 0 THEN SUM(asset_class_value) / SUM(total_portfolio_value) ELSE NULL END AS portfolio_allocation_pct FROM wealth_management
metrics.snowflake: SELECT IFF(SUM(total_portfolio_value) <> 0, SUM(asset_class_value) / SUM(total_portfolio_value), NULL) AS portfolio_allocation_pct FROM wealth_management
metrics.iceberg: SELECT IF(SUM(total_portfolio_value) != 0, SUM(asset_class_value) / SUM(total_portfolio_value), NULL) AS portfolio_allocation_pct FROM wealth_management

metrics.snowflake: SELECT IFF(AVG(earning_assets) <> 0, (SUM(interest_income) - SUM(interest_expense)) / AVG(earning_assets), NULL) AS net_interest_margin FROM banking
metrics.iceberg: SELECT IF(AVG(earning_assets) != 0, (SUM(interest_income) - SUM(interest_expense)) / AVG(earning_assets), NULL) AS net_interest_margin FROM banking

function_mapping_appendix.description: DAX-to-SQL function mapping reference for cross-engine consistency

mappings.sql_server: CASE WHEN b <> 0 THEN a / b ELSE alt END
mappings.oracle: CASE WHEN b <> 0 THEN a / b ELSE alt END
mappings.postgres: CASE WHEN b <> 0 THEN a / b ELSE alt END

mappings.sql_server: SUM(expr) OVER (PARTITION BY YEAR(date) ORDER BY date ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING)
mappings.oracle: SUM(expr) OVER (PARTITION BY EXTRACT(YEAR FROM date) ORDER BY date ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING)
mappings.postgres: SUM(expr) OVER (PARTITION BY EXTRACT(YEAR FROM date) ORDER BY date ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING)
mappings.snowflake: SUM(expr) OVER (PARTITION BY YEAR(date) ORDER BY date ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING)
mappings.iceberg: SUM(expr) OVER (PARTITION BY YEAR(date) ORDER BY date ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING)
